summary:
- publisher=UKMTO, title=Advisories - 2025, directness=high, why=Primary source for official 2025 advisories on Strait of Hormuz maritime security, next=https://www.ukmto.org/ukmto-products/advisories/2025  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=Recent Incidents, directness=high, why=Real-time incident reporting hub; currently shows "0 reports" for 2025, indicating no public incidents logged yet, next=https://www.ukmto.org/recent-incidents  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=UKMTO Products: Advisories & Monthly Reports, directness=high, why=Source of structured maritime security intel including advisories and monthly updates; confirms advisories are published under UKMTO Products, next=https://www.ukmto.org/ukmto-products  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=Monthly Maritime Security Update Report, directness=medium, why=Official monthly summary likely contains aggregated Strait of Hormuz activity; critical for trend analysis, next=https://www.ukmto.org/ukmto-products/monthly-reports  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=JMIC Week 25 Dashboard (16–22 June 2025), directness=high, why=Active 2025 operational dashboard with embedded incident data; PDF metadata confirms publication date in 2025, next=https://www.ukmto.org/-/media/ukmto/products/jmic-week-25-dashboard-16-june---22-june-2025.pdf?rev=7b0538cb316443aab605fdcd7333b114
